view.title: View Iron Golem {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Art thou certain thou wishest to resend the welcoming stone?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcoming stone hath been resent. Check thy inbox.

reverseDns.title: Reverse Summoning Registry Settings
reverseDns.changeWarning: Changes to reverse summoning registry take up to an hour to manifest.

ipmiLive.title: IPMI Ether Address
ipmiLive.description: Grants live ether address to IPMI controller restricted to thy ether address and limited to 24 hours of use.
ipmiLive.emailIpmiCredentials: Dispatch IPMI Credentials via Sending Stone

order.title: Conjure Iron Golem
order.hostnameHelp: Use the realm address to identify the iron golem. The territory doth not need to be valid or registered. One period is required. Other examples: database.local, web.golem or thy.name.
order.passwordRequirement: Note: Incantation must contain at least 8 runes, one lowercase rune, one uppercase rune, one numeral, a special sigil.
order.agreeToTerms: Bind thyself to the covenant terms
order.autoRenewNotice: The binding shall automatically renew after every moon cycle at {cost} until dispelled.
order.tosAcknowledgement: By marking this rune, thou dost acknowledge that thou art conjuring a subscription product that automatically renews (As Per The Terms Outlined Above) and is billed to the payment rune thou dost provide today. If thou dost wish to dispel thy auto-renewal, thou mayest access the patron portal select the enchanted service and click the Dispel portal or send a stone to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Terms and Conditions. By marking the rune and clicking Place My Conjuration below, thou dost also acknowledge thou hast read, understand, and agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.iAgreeToTerms: I have read the terms above and I bind myself.
